holdings.infoBox: JDST is an equity ETF with a total of 11 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily Junior Gold Miners Index Bear 2X ETF (JDST) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Junior Gold Miners index. The fund provides daily -2x exposure to an index of junior gold and silver mining companies from developed as well as emerging markets. JDST was launched on Oct 3, 2013 and is issued by Direxion.
